discrepancies.description: README.md documents WatchdogKick as RAII guard for 60ms software watchdog, but the actual implementation uses kick_watchdog() method directly without RAII wrapper class
discrepancies.expected: Documentation should show kick_watchdog() method call pattern
discrepancies.actual: Documentation shows RAII WatchdogKick pattern that doesn't exist in code
discrepancies.suggested_update: Update README.md example to show: monitor.kick_watchdog() instead of WatchdogKick RAII pattern
discrepancies.code_example_error: WatchdogKick class not found in safety_monitor.hpp

discrepancies.description: README.md shows camera->try_capture_frame(frame) but the actual API in camera_wrapper.hpp has both capture_frame() and try_capture_frame() - documentation only shows one variant
discrepancies.expected: Documentation should show both blocking and non-blocking capture variants
discrepancies.actual: Documentation only shows try_capture_frame() without timeout parameter
discrepancies.suggested_update: Add documentation for both capture_frame(frame, timeout_ms) and try_capture_frame(frame)

discrepancies.description: README.md shows running tests via './aurore_tests' but CMakeLists.txt creates individual test executables (ring_buffer_test, timing_test, etc.) and uses ctest - no unified aurore_tests binary exists
discrepancies.expected: Documentation should show 'ctest --output-on-failure' or list individual test binaries

discrepancies.description: QWEN.md shows data flow ending with 'safety_monitor (1kHz, watches all threads)' but safety_monitor.hpp shows per-stage monitoring with record_stage_latency() and record_frame_complete() that aren't used in main.cpp
discrepancies.expected: Documentation should reflect that safety monitor uses update_vision_frame() and update_actuation_frame() for basic monitoring, with optional per-stage latency tracking
discrepancies.actual: Documentation shows simplified data flow without per-stage monitoring hooks
discrepancies.suggested_update: Update QWEN.md data flow to show per-stage latency recording: 'record_stage_latency(PipelineStage::VISION, latency_ns)'

discrepancies.description: README.md and QWEN.md mention TelemetryWriter in 'What Is Implemented' but provide no usage examples or API documentation
discrepancies.expected: Documentation should include TelemetryWriter usage example similar to other components
discrepancies.actual: TelemetryWriter is listed but not documented with examples
discrepancies.suggested_update: Add TelemetryWriter section to README.md Key Components with usage example

discrepancies.description: State machine implementation exists (src/state_machine/state_machine.cpp) but is not documented in README.md despite being listed in QWEN.md as implemented
discrepancies.expected: Documentation should include StateMachine usage example
discrepancies.actual: StateMachine is implemented but undocumented in README.md
discrepancies.suggested_update: Add StateMachine section to README.md showing state transitions: BOOT→IDLE→FREECAM→SEARCH→TRACKING→ARMED→FAULT

discrepancies.description: QWEN.md mentions CSRT tracker in TODO section, but code actually implements KCF tracker (KcfTracker class in tracker.hpp) which is faster and WCET-compliant
discrepancies.expected: Documentation should reflect KCF tracker implementation instead of CSRT
discrepancies.actual: Documentation references CSRT but code uses KCF for 120Hz tracking
discrepancies.suggested_update: Update QWEN.md to state: 'KCF tracker (1-2ms) implemented for 120Hz tracking, CSRT would be 10-20ms'

discrepancies.description: README.md shows WCET results in './wcet_results/' but the script and CMakeLists.txt don't create this directory - results go to stdout or custom location
discrepancies.expected: Documentation should specify actual output location or script should create documented directory
discrepancies.suggested_update: Either create wcet_results/ directory in script or update README.md to show actual output behavior

discrepancies.description: QWEN.md lists src/vision/, src/tracking/, src/actuation/, src/state_machine/, src/drivers/fusion_hat_i2c.cpp as 'TODO stubs (commented out in CMakeLists.txt)' but CMakeLists.txt actually includes them as active sources
discrepancies.expected: Documentation should reflect that these modules are now implemented and compiled
discrepancies.actual: Documentation says TODO but code is implemented and built
discrepancies.suggested_update: Update QWEN.md 'What Is Implemented' section to include: orb_detector, csrt_tracker (actually KCF), ballistic_solver, state_machine, fusion_hat_i2c, hud_socket, telemetry_writer

discrepancies.description: AuroreMkVI/AGENTS.md documents Mk VI (Edge TPU + TFLite) architecture which differs significantly from MkVII (libcamera + OpenCV + KCF tracker). This historical document may confuse developers about current architecture
discrepancies.expected: AuroreMkVI/AGENTS.md should have clear deprecation notice
discrepancies.actual: AGENTS.md presents Mk VI as reference without clear deprecation status
discrepancies.suggested_update: Add prominent DEPRECATED notice to AuroreMkVI/AGENTS.md header stating Mk VII uses different architecture

discrepancies.description: BallisticSolver is implemented with kinetic and drop modes but not documented in README.md despite being a key component
discrepancies.expected: Documentation should include BallisticSolver usage example
discrepancies.suggested_update: Add BallisticSolver section to README.md showing solve() API and EngagementMode selection

discrepancies.description: FusionHat I2C driver is implemented but not documented in README.md despite being mentioned in TODO sections
discrepancies.expected: Documentation should include FusionHat usage example
discrepancies.suggested_update: Add FusionHat section to README.md showing I2C initialization and PWM control API

code_examples_validated.fix_suggested: Replace RAII example with direct kick_watchdog() call
Update to 'ctest --output-on-failure' or list individual test binaries
Add both capture_frame() and try_capture_frame() examples

missing_documentation.documentation_gap: No usage examples or API documentation in README.md
No state transition documentation or usage examples

missing_documentation.feature: BallisticSolver - Ballistic solution calculation with kinetic/drop modes
missing_documentation.documentation_gap: No API documentation or engagement mode explanation

missing_documentation.feature: FusionHat - I2C gimbal controller with PWM output
missing_documentation.documentation_gap: No I2C setup or PWM control documentation

missing_documentation.feature: KcfTracker - KCF tracker (not CSRT as documented)
missing_documentation.documentation_gap: Documentation references CSRT but implementation uses KCF for WCET compliance
record_stage_latency() and PipelineStage enum not documented

accurate_documentation.notes: Thread priorities, CPU affinity, and phase offsets match src/main.cpp
build-native.sh and build-rpi.sh scripts match documented commands
Kernel boot parameters and CPU governor settings are correct

recommendations.issue: DRIFT_003: Non-existent test binary './aurore_tests' in documentation
recommendations.fix: Update README.md Testing section to use 'ctest --output-on-failure' or list individual test executables

recommendations.issue: DRIFT_001: WatchdogKick RAII pattern documented but not implemented
recommendations.fix: Update README.md Safety Monitor example to use kick_watchdog() method directly

recommendations.issue: DRIFT_009: QWEN.md lists implemented modules as TODO stubs
recommendations.fix: Update QWEN.md 'What Is Implemented' section to include orb_detector, KcfTracker, ballistic_solver, state_machine, fusion_hat_i2c

recommendations.issue: DRIFT_007: Documentation references CSRT tracker but code uses KCF
recommendations.fix: Update QWEN.md to document KCF tracker implementation and WCET rationale

recommendations.issue: DRIFT_005, DRIFT_006, DRIFT_011, DRIFT_012: Missing documentation for implemented components
recommendations.fix: Add Key Components sections for TelemetryWriter, StateMachine, BallisticSolver, and FusionHat
Add DEPRECATED notice to AGENTS.md header clarifying Mk VII uses different architecture
